title: Publish Version 11 to production and confirm live app functionality

requirements.text: Publish the latest build (Version 11) to production so the end-user-facing live app is updated.
acceptanceCriteria: A production deployment is triggered for Version 11 and completes successfully (no generic "Deployment error").
The production frontend loads in a browser without showing a backend connectivity error card (e.g., "Canister Id not resolved").

requirements.text: After publishing Version 11, verify the production site against the checklist in frontend/PRODUCTION_SMOKE_TEST.md, including that the Daily Entry page action buttons (Clear Form, Copy for Vendor, Save Record) are enabled and functional.
acceptanceCriteria: On the production URL, the Daily Entry page finishes loading and the three action buttons are clickable (not disabled/grayed out).
Clear Form clears entered inputs and resets the Balance Date field.
Copy for Vendor shows the required validation toast when Balance Date is missing, and successfully copies formatted text when Balance Date is set.
Save Record successfully saves a record and it appears in History and opens in Record Details.

requirements.text: If the production frontend URL changes as a result of publishing Version 11, update frontend/LIVE_URL.md to contain the correct live (production) app URL that end users should open in a browser.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/LIVE_URL.md contains the correct current production URL and no longer points to an outdated deployment.
The URL in frontend/LIVE_URL.md is reachable and loads the production app.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo; only add backend/migration.mo if an upgrade requires state migration.
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or other frontend immutable paths; compose them instead.
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Adding new product features unrelated to publishing Version 11.
Changing the predefined ingredient list, categories, or record format as part of this publish step.
